files.name: yolo-card-nano.onnx
files.purpose: Card detection overlay (YOLOv8 FP16 from trained best_fp16.onnx). NOTE: 50 MB is larger than plan-spec 6.2 MB; consider re-exporting a true YOLOv8n backbone if bandwidth is a concern.

files.name: silero-vad.onnx
files.purpose: Voice activity detection — skip upload on silent captures. Canonical release from github.com/snakers4/silero-vad.
